name: Prairie Links Golf Club
about: Prairie Links Golf Club is a full-service country club in Waverly, Iowa, featuring an 18-hole golf course and a range of amenities. The facility includes a swimming pool, Clubhouse, Patio & Grill, and event spaces for weddings and gatherings. The club offers memberships with access to the course, pool, and Full Swing Golf Simulator, which is available for use as a driving range from April to October. No food and beverage minimums are required for members.
why_golfers_like_it: Unlimited access to the Full Swing Golf Simulator from April to October
No food and beverage minimums for members
25% discount on weddings and free cafe rental with catering
Early tee time booking with a private member login
10% discount on all restaurant and apparel purchases

food_and_drink.notes: Available at the Patio & Grill and Clubhouse
Available at the Patio & Grill and Clubhouse

simulator_hardware.notes: Available year-round, used as a driving range

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need your own clubs to use the golf simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, all food and beverage must be purchased through Prairie Links for events at the pool.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified on the website.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is kid-friendly. Children must be accompanied by an adult in the pool area.
